indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: Couches are not designed for sleep and do not provide a suitable surface for lying down.

indicators.name: light
indicators.rationale: Bright artificial lighting is incompatible with sleep and can disrupt circadian rhythms.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: An open layout with no walls or dividers makes it difficult to achieve a quiet, undisturbed sleep environment.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The presence of couches and bright artificial lighting, combined with an open layout, make this environment unsuitable for sleep. The score is 3 out of 7 because there are no positive indicators present.
